entry.title: SAP Maintenance Assistant 2408 Now Available – What’s New?
entry.content:
The SAP Mobile Service and Asset Management team is pleased to share details of the latest release of SAP Maintenance Assistant, version 2408, the mobile maintenance execution solution for SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Our latest update update enhances efficiency for plant maintenance technicians with improved time reporting, streamlined equipment management, and intuitive data input. For backend administrators, it offers better monitoring tools, faster data synchronization, and advanced reporting capabilities.

Features delivered in the 2408 release

Install and dismantle equipment

Installing and dismantling equipment is a common part of asset maintenance as some equipment requires periodic overhauls, which involve dismantling and replacing significant components. Using the mobile application during configuration and replacement processes helps ensure the equipment hierarchy is recorded properly in the master data

Installation and dismantling may be initiated in the mobile app from any functional location or equipment detail page. The technician can then verify the parent/child relationship of newly installed or dismantled equipment using the hierarchy view.

 

Operation page improvements

Continuing our work toward modernizing the SAP Maintenance Assistant user experience, operation details pages have been updated to improve efficiency. Sections have been reorganized to prioritize the most relevant information for the technician.

Common objects are represented by new colorful icons to easily differentiate the type, e.g., maintenance order, technical object, etc.

Documents are now shown individually in a dedicated section on the detail page accompanied by a document preview. The attachment may be opened and viewed, and new attachments added without navigating to a separate page.

Measurement readings with editable data table

The new editable data table functionality transforms data input by enabling direct value entry and swift handling of multiple records. Users now can seamlessly input measurement point values directly into the table, significantly expediting workflows, especially when dealing with tasks involving multiple records, such as recording results for inspections.

This table supports various input controls — text, lists, numbers, switches, and buttons — providing a versatile toolkit for efficient data handling, and the option to designate a sticky column facilitates smooth horizontal and vertical scrolling while ensuring crucial data remains visible regardless of navigation.

Fiori applications

Two new Fiori applications are now available to provide greater visibility for administrators into activities on the mobile device.

Monitor Communication Session History enables investigations into the length of initial and delta synchronizations. An administrator can monitor the communication sessions between the mobile client and the backend system and filter for user communication sessions.

Monitor Data Object Mobile Status History can be used app to monitor business objects that were changed in the mobile app.

Optimized delta synchronization

The latest release introduces updates designed to streamline the synchronization process. This enhancement refines the delta synchronization workflow by identifying and targeting only entities that have undergone changes since the last synchronization.

By default, when users trigger delta synchronization, the application initiates an upload of locally created transactions. Subsequently, an interactive call efficiently identifies entities requiring updates or modifications since the previous synchronization. Delta synchronization then exclusively targets these altered entities, eliminating redundant sync actions and significantly optimizing the duration required for the synchronization process.

This optimization ensures that only pertinent data is synchronized, enhancing efficiency, and minimizing the time and resources required for delta synchronization.

Support for CDS Views

CDS (Core Data Services) views are standardized and reusable data models that can be leveraged across various SAP applications. With support in this release, customers may generate a report of mobile transaction history for a set of business object types, mobile users, or mobile applications.

Data points from the mobile application can be used to build intelligent operational dashboards. For example, understanding the meantime to repair and meantime to complete the work can provide valuable insights into technician productivity.

For customers using SAP Analytics Cloud, the SAP Maintenance Assistant CDS view is available as a data source.

Learn more about Integration with SAP Analytics Cloud using MAIF data sources

Release available now

SAP Maintenance Assistant is available now. The application is publicly available and includes an offline demo mode for viewing and testing the functionality. The application may be downloaded from the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.

Submit innovation requests

We encourage you to visit the SAP Mobile Service and Asset Management Customer Influence portal to submit improvement requests. Use the "SAP Maintenance Assistant for S/4HANA Public Cloud" category to properly direct your request.

Explore other SAP mobile applications

SAP has a powerful suite of SAP native mobile applications. Visit the SAP Mobile Experience community for the latest updates.

entry.title: Re: 🟣 Transform Data with Scripting in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: I'm looking forward to learning more about this long awaited feature.  Has this roadmap item already been release for GA?

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP S/4HANA Invoicing with KSeF Using SAP Event Mesh and CAP
entry.content:
Hi,

could you elaborate why you use the CAP based approach instead of a SAP Cloud Integration Flow? As SAP Event Mesh can only be instanciated when you get SAP Integration Suite I see also no cost saving aspect.Also I would hope that SAP or some SAP Partner would provide some standard integration content.

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: Re: Initial Release of the Lite Viewer for SAP Analytics Cloud Stories
entry.content:
@Tunir 

Incident has been submitted, 842281/2024. I don't mind the idea, but there is a lot of informal link sharing among our 2500+ users, especially among executives in our company as well as Digital Boardroom directories and table of contents pages that use URL's that this is having a large impact on our customers.

entry.title: Re: Developing locally with PostgreSQL BTP Instance
entry.content: To be not blocked in developing I would suggest you use a PostgreSQL docker container during development. Check https://github.com/gregorwolf/pg-beershop and https://github.com/cap-js/cds-dbs/tree/main/postgres for samples.

entry.title: Re: Initial Release of the Lite Viewer for SAP Analytics Cloud Stories
entry.content:
@Tunir 

Incident 842281/2024 has been opened, and would appreciate your assistance with resolution as were getting some pushback.

I get the concept of the idea, but with 2500+ users, and digital boardroom story directories and tables of contents linking to many stories this is having an adverse affect on people as it's hiding input controls and thresholding that was purposefully requested and a part of the intended design and flooding our customer success team with questions.

entry.title: Re: How can I use Launchpad Notifications with a RAP App?
entry.content: Are you asking for BTP ABAP Environment or for ABAP and Launchpad on Prem?

entry.title: Re: Manage Basic Compliance Data - Product Categorization
entry.content: Hello Michael,

entry.title: Re: Missing Web Recorder Videos
entry.content:
Hi Parmsethi,

It is very likely that the content you are missing is in the Manager Trash.  Can you please do the following:

1. Open Manager and then click > beside the Trash object to display the content in the Trash
2. Click on the folder object, if it's in the Trash, for one of the missing objects
3. Click the Restore button in the top, right corner.  This is likely to move the folder, and the corresponding video, into the Unsorted folder
4. If the content is in the Unsorted folder, start editing the AR Info Sessions folder in Manager
5. Refresh the folder and I think the content will now be back in place beneath the AR Info Sessions folder
6. Finish editing

Hopefully that will help you to get your content back.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Manage Basic Compliance Data - Product Categorization
entry.content:

Thanks for mentioning the batch job.

Thanks & Regards,

Subhash Mullapudi

Kamila

entry.title: Creating a variable to Sum the column (WEBI)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am working on a report which looks like:

Machine TypeUnique Machine IDNumber of bins in machineSales ASales BSales C = Sales A + Sales B
M 11231 (coming from machine type)102030
M 22122202040
M 22312151530
M 32343101020
M 15671102030
M 12241151530

I want to create a summary report which shows Sales C for each Machine Type i.e. M1, M2 and M3. But I tried doing it by setting Machine Type as section and applying break. But I am unable to sum the sales for respective Machine Types. I don't want to use the "sum" from "Analysis", I want to do it by creating a separate variable. I want result like:

Machine TypeNumber of bins in machinev_Total_Sales 
M 1190
M 2270
M 3320

I am using WeBI. Can you help?

Thank you for your help!!

Thank you so much for your time!

Best regards,

Mahira H.

Without finding any other logical explanation, it appears to me as if the upgrade just wiped out these files without a trace.

entry.title: Optimizing Your SAP S/4HANA Landscape with a Best Practice Role Concept
entry.content:
Experts familiar with SAP authorizations are well aware that quality issues and complexity of legacy role concepts often prompt the desire to start from scratch with a brand-new concept. However, the thought of the associated effort and high costs discourages many. What if there were a more efficient solution?

Typically, the following topics are initiators for a revision of authorization concepts:

  • SAP S/4HANA implementations in cloud or hybrid environments usually require – following the "keep the core clean" strategy – a new SAP S/4HANA authorization concept as well as an authorization concept for the SAP Business Technology Platform.
  • SAP S/4HANA greenfield implementations for new SAP customers as well as existing SAP customers developing new processes based on SAP S/4HANA require a new authorization concept that fits to their new process design and covers access to SAP Fiori Launchpad
  • SAP S/4HANA brownfield implementations that cause a redesign or at least an update of the existing authorization concept.
  • Audit and compliance requirements that may result in a revision or redesign of the SAP authorization concept.

In this blog post, we introduce the benefits of the “Automated Implementation of Role Concept” Service ("AIRC Service"), which shortens the efforts and duration of the projects by applying pre-defined roles and a high level of automation. Based on a clear methodology, the service has proven to be a key for the success of authorization projects within more than 200 customer projects over the past 15 years.

How does the use case look like for the implementation of a new authorization concept?

 

 

 

When developing a new authorization concept, the initial scope is important, i.e. which applications (i.e. Transactions as well as Fiori Apps) should be part of the authorization concept. This is a task in the responsibility of the business departments, but AIRC service supports it by offering the following approaches:

  • "Top-Down Approach" via SAP Signavio Extraction or manual upload:
    •  With the AIRC service, data can be automatically extracted from SAP Signavio. SAP Signavio is the recommended solution for the (re-) design of Business Processes.
    • If other tools for modelling business processes are in place, the data can be exported and used by AIRC Service.

The Top-Down Approach is the preferred method for greenfield implementations.

  • Business Reverse Engineering:
    • By examining the transactions used in the SAP system, which can be extracted and used as a baseline for defining the new role proposal, the AIRC ensures that only the necessary functions are authorized. For customers moving from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA or upgrading their SAP S/4HANA, the following analyses are also helpful:
      • SAP S/4HANA Impact Analysis: This analysis checks applications for availability in the target release and lists any corresponding successor applications (transactions or apps).
      • Fiori App Recommendations: This analysis lists which native Fiori apps can complement a defined range of SAP transactions.

“Business Reverse Engineering” is the preferred method for brownfield implementations.

 

Best Practice Role Proposal

Over the years, SAP Services have developed a database consisting of proven best practice roles that meet the following quality criteria:

  • Functional role concept
  • Consideration of typical segregation of duty (SoD) requirements
  • Display and maintenance roles
  • Module-specific roles
  • SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) authorization concept
  • and many more

This database is constantly being expanded based on new applications (e.g. new Fiori apps) and continuously optimized based on customer feedback.

Using the methods described above, we can quickly provide the customer with a customized role proposal from the intersection of the scope and our role database (often already at the project kick-off). We also offer role assignments for customer-specific applications using algorithms (partly AI-based).

The role proposal provides a solid framework that significantly reduces efforts in the business departments, enhances quality, and stipulates a unified format.

 

Role Implementation

The AIRC service considerably supports the implementation of roles through automation, greatly reducing the efforts required for implementation.  The following steps outline the implementation:

  • Creation of roles with corresponding applications: Based on the authorization concept revised by the business departments, PFCG roles and Fiori catalogs, including assignment of transactions and Fiori apps, are generated using the AIRC service tool-based approach.
  • Maintenance of non-organizational authorization fields: The corresponding authorization values in the roles are manually maintained with the help of standard proposals (SU24) and feedback from the business departments.
  • Generation of organizational or non-organizational supplementary roles: Special authorizations require supplementary roles, consisting of distinct authorization objects (examples include release codes, order types, document types, etc.). We generate these roles from Excel files using a tool-based approach.
  • Generation of role derivations: We recommend using the SAP standard derivation concept. For each organization, so-called "orgsets" can be defined, which contain the specifications for the organizational restrictions of that organization (company code, plant, purchasing organization, sales organization, etc.). Role derivations can then be generated using the AIRC service based on these “orgsets”. This step is not feasible to perform manually for larger companies or projects involving around 20, 100, or 200 organizations.
  • Generation of SAP SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform) roles and role collections: In "side-by-side extensions", business data can also end up in the SAP BTP, which can lead to many SAP BTP roles / role collections. The AIRC service offers tools necessary for generating and transporting these roles, protecting you from unpleasant surprises such as significant manual efforts just before Go-Live.

 

Testing roles

For re-design projects, the SAP standard offers a very useful, currently not very well-known feature:

With the transaction "STSIMAUTHCHECK" it is possible to simulate which authorization checks would fail when using new roles instead of old ones. In our experience, for new implementations, the classic method of testing and ad hoc correcting roles individually is one of the most effective. The AIRC service can also be used in conjunction with partner products that support the tests.

 

Assignment of roles to users

If usage data is available, we support the assignment of roles to test users and end users with role assignment proposal, structured according to the following procedure:

  • Allocation of default authorization roles
  • If an application has been used by a user that occurs in different roles, the less critical role is initially suggested.
  • Organizational assignments can be made based on the user's organizational assignments or based on the organizational assignments of the old roles.

If the customer does not have their own Identity Access Management tools, we support the implementation of the assignment with corresponding tools (ABAP and SAP BTP).

 

Go-Live

With the use of "STSIMAUTHCHECK," you can conduct a so called "Protected Go-Live", which is carried out using old authorizations and logging of theoretical authorization errors caused by the new roles. For a re-design, the transition usually occurs in two to four increasingly larger user packages.

Do I also get support if I decide to rely on my former role concept?

If there are no major changes in business processes and the authorization concept of the customer is already at a high-quality level, customers might decide not to reimplement the authorization concept with SAP S/4HANA.  For all the new topics (e.g. roles for SAP BTP) the above steps can still be applied. For the existing role concept, the differences between SAP ECC and SAP S/4HANA or between different SAP S/4HANA releases can be derived by an Impact Analysis. We will not further describe this topic in this blog post, please contact us if you want to get further details on this topic.

Wrapping It Up: Key Takeaways

The AIRC service addresses the required re-design of permissions within upcoming changes such as cloud transformations, SAP S/4HANA projects, or tightened compliance requirements. With the AIRC service's help, the implementation efforts and runtime of authorization projects can be greatly reduced. You will receive a standardized and well-proven role concept that meets common compliance requirements. The service’s automations also support newer technologies like processing Fiori artifacts and SAP BTP Roles/Role Collections, preventing issues with newer technologies in upcoming projects.

entry.title: Managing Legacy and SAP Supplier IDs During S4HC Data Migration
entry.content:
In the data migration to S4HC, we have opted for SAP to generate new IDs for each legacy supplier ID.

For other migration files, such as PIRs and POs, where there is a "Supplier" field, should we use the new SAP IDs or the legacy IDs to migrate them ? If we need to use the SAP IDs, this will involve additional manual work for us. Alternatively, if we use the legacy IDs, will SAP recognize and map them automatically to the new SAP IDs generated ?

Thank you for your assistance with this matter.

entry.title: DRC configuration - create Tax Group - how to add Tax Rate field as a parameter?
entry.content:
Version: SAP S/4 HANA On-Premise

Question: DRC configuration question - how to enhance the configuration table of Tax Group to add Tax Rate column? What other impact does it have by adding Tax Rate into this definition of Tax Group?

Tax Rate is required to differentiate the Tax Groups (and subsequently map to different Tax Boxes). 

e.g. DE VAT Return 

Tax Code DA - 19% => mapped to Tax Group 81 (Tax Box 81)

Tax Code DA - 16% => mapped to Tax Group 35 (Tax Box 35)

The background is that tax code remains the same one DA for the VAT rate change from 19% to 16% using a third party time-dependent tax code solution (not SAP TDT solution as it is not available yet in On-Premise).

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
entry.content:
Hello Learners,

Here's is the solution for task 4 along with the list and object page. Both has the cardinality included in it. 😎

List Page with three different cardinalities.

Object Page with cardinality

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Foundry Launchpad Application Component JS is missing

entry.title: Re: Control who appears in org chart
entry.content:
Please see this KBA - https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2880339 this gives an idea on how it can be implemented.

We had something similar but we had implemented it using the concept of External Users but since SAP doesn't recommend that approach, you will need to have the employees in SuccessFactors.

entry.title: Re: Categorization of Products as Articles
entry.content:
Hi @Michael_Mulder,

Greetings for the Day!!!

Thanks for providing more insight into the product categorization. I am currently facing an issue where the values related to the product configuration are not displayed when I try to create a new product for unpackaged products.

So, I request you to help me configure it. Is there a way to get those values populated? The product configuration is a mandatory field.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Subhash Mullapudi

entry.title: Re: How to keep track of graduates in SuccessFactors
entry.content: There is nothing as a standard functionality for this. Are these graduates setup in your employee profile? Are they kind Interns or Temp Assignment employees working in your organziation?

entry.title: I have a business Requirement to extend FIORI app - Post Goods Receipt for Inbound Delivery
entry.content:
I have a business Requirement to extend FIORI app - Post Goods Receipt for Inbound Delivery
Currently, S4 creates purchase order with vendor for core and battery products specially with ORD vendor. Based on BOM set up, when PO gets created for battery products, core automatically gets added as second line.

Requirement is to enhance the standard app when inbound delivery line item has Higher-level item value populated (LIPS- UEPOS not equal to blank), then do not show item on screen.
I found BADI MMIM_GR4XY_PROVIDE_DATA to write custom code, any ideas how to fetch data from LIPS table to fetch UEPOS value, (SELECT statement is giving error 'Use of table is not permitted')

entry.title: Re: Date . . contains invalid character ,infotype 2 is in...
entry.content:
I have seen this similar error, though it's for between Infotype 15 and the secondary infotype 3430.

I would recommend you to check, the data in the secondary infotype of Infotype 2. You will need to identify the field and then look the secondary infotype details.

The way we could handle as an adhoc measure was to put a valid date, save the record and then remove the values and save the record again.

Though the replication logic should be evaluated just to check why was the date stored with . . or /  / characters in the secondary infotype.

entry.title: Re: Comparison of SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office (SAC edition) vs. SAC add-in for Microsoft Excel
entry.content: @SteffenHeine Thank you for the clarification. Appreciate your prompt response.

entry.title: Re: I have a business Requirement to extend FIORI app - Post Goods Receipt for Inbound Delivery
entry.content: What is the code that you are using?

entry.title: Bulk updates in Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi guys

I use Enable now to record training simulations that have over 100 slides. When I need to complete a minor update eg. updating a title that appears in all the slides, does anyone have a simple solution to work around this? Manually updating each slide is not ideal. 

Can someone point to me any training material/ideas/solutions you have for bulk updating imagery/text in SAP Enable Now please?

entry.title: Re: I have a business Requirement to extend FIORI app - P...
entry.content:
Hi Ryan,

I am using below code to fetch UEPOS value from LIPS

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_vbeln,
vbeln TYPE vbeln,
END OF ty_vbeln.

DATA: lt_vbeln TYPE TABLE OF ty_vbeln,
ls_vbeln TYPE ty_vbeln.

*** type conversion
LOOP AT gr4xy_item INTO DATA(ls_item).
ls_vbeln-vbeln = ls_item-inbounddelivery.
APPEND ls_vbeln TO lt_vbeln.
ENDLOOP.


IF gr4xy_header-sourceofgr EQ 'INBDELIV'. " for Inbound Delivery only
IF lt_vbeln IS NOT INITIAL.

SELECT vbeln, posnr, uepos FROM lips INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_item)
FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @LT_vbeln
 WHERE vbeln = @LT_vbeln-vbeln.
ENDIF.
ENDIF.

 

Select statement gives error, I also tried Call Function, but it says 'Call' command not allowed.

entry.title: Re: Bulk updates in Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi,

There are a number of different ways to perform bulk changes to Enable Now content, e.g. Simulations, depending on what you want to change.  Can you please add an image to the ticket to confirm what part of your Simulations that you want to modify.  If it is the Screen Title for each screenshot, I'm not aware of any way to modify the recorded titles.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hi,

display all the fields in the Fiori app by default.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 search field and enable search by ‘Description’ in the filter bar.

value help filter on the ‘Status text’ field based on Overall Status text.

provide a filter for the Travel ID field.

entry.title: Re: Bulk updates in Enable Now
entry.content:
Apologies Shane, my question wasn't very clear. 

I was referring to the actual captured content in each slide. For example, when we record a simulation, the content captured may have the business owners logo. 

When the business owners update their logo, and this is the only change that is required for the simulation, the only way I can update this is by manually going into each slide, selecting it to edit and replacing the logo with the new one. 

In future updates we may need to update a sentence referenced in the training material, or a change of colour. 

These minor updates in our simulations is time very time consuming, as we could have over 100 slides in them. Is there a way we can setup SEN or a solution when it comes to bulk editing?

entry.title: Re: Service Order with Advance Shipment of Spare Parts
entry.content:
Dear Gert,

I would like to understand and learn from you, if earlier Service Order Shipment was mapped in ECC and now SAP version being upgraded to S4 HANA 2023 FPS1, will process be same in ECC or will it work in S4 HANA 2023 as a functionality ?

Right now, in S4 HANA 2020, when try to create Shipment Document from Service Order, I am getting some message "price determination can not be carried out". I tried different ways to resolve but no success yet.

Kindly share steps or pre-requisites that I could be missing.

However, appreciate this post as very informative and knowledge sharing.

Sincere Regards,

Keyur.

entry.title: Re: Hierarchy node not visible in BW Query
entry.content:
Your question doesnot give a clear picture on how and where you are using the hier in query. Are there any other global filters in query.

You mentioned that there is data in DSO. But Did you check the aggregated value for that cost element . It could be zero and that could be the reason for not displaying in query output.

entry.title: Re: Story reports Time type end date filter issues
entry.content:
Hi @VM90,

Can you please try to create report on Employee Time calendar object. please check below link

Employee Time Calendar Creation for Absence Reporting | SAP Help Portal

Regards,

Subbu

entry.title: Re: Issue with long running PAL Function on HANA
entry.content: I'm from PAL team. We are now analyzing this issue and will come back to you asap.

entry.title: Generate Consolidated Payment Idoc for APP - F110
entry.content:
F110 Query:

  1. APP - F110 we need to generate Single/ Consolidated Payment Idocs for Multiple Payments.
  2. This Idoc should have Multiple Invoices + Multiple Supplier Payments combined into Single Idoc.
  3. Currently the Message Type - PAYEXT Idoc is generating separate Idocs per Vendor which is a not matching the Interface requirement.
  4. There is cost component associated for this and hence we are looking for SAP recommendation on generating Single/ Consolidate Payment Idoc combining all payments executed for any given day.

entry.title: Unable to reprint output delivery
entry.content:
We use old GUI app VL01N to create delivery with SO quantity of 10 and change delivery quantity to 8. However, we cannot reprint the outbound delivery if we further update the quantity to 5 as the picking_list form already in completed status.

Even we click "View Delivery Output" via new Fiori app "Pick outbound delivery", it still cannot reprint the output document with latest quantity number as well.

Please advise if there is available option in S4hana cloud that we can reprint the delivery with up-to-date quantity information?

entry.title: Cash flow statement creation
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We have checked the SAP guide and many blogs, but unable to find how to do configuration for the cash flow statement in S4HANA cloud public edition. We would like to know if there is any linkage with the P&L configuration for the cash flow statement and what are the relevant settings that we should be aware? What app should we use to view the cash flow statement? What is the difference of indirect method?

entry.title: Re: Generate Consolidated Payment Idoc for APP - F110
entry.content: X

entry.title: Re: Cash flow statement creation
entry.content:
Hi, Please find documentation about configuration and app description of Cash Flow Statement - Indirect Method.

Regards,

Grace

entry.title: Re: Cash flow statement creation
entry.content: Apart of indirect method, is there any direct method for cash flow statement?

entry.title: Re: Cash flow statement creation
entry.content: Hi, Those Cash Flow Statements are configured using Manage Global Hierarchies (hierarchy type = FSV). SAP delivers several sample cash flow statement FSVs in the system. You can take reference to them.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

My name is Tuan Anh and I am 34 years old.

I identify myself as: People looking to switch their careers mid-life.

I have just finished the learning journey " Explore Integrated Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA". In the future, I want to boost my career with Group Reporting skills.

Here the completion picture of the learning journey:

I hope that you will consider my request.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: AI's Veiled Brilliance: Unraveling Encoded Reasoning
entry.content: Read this blog on LinkedIn and connect with me over there for more upcoming articles/blogs.

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
The CPI link RFC request does not return a value
entry.content: I created an RFC interface between CPI and HANA system, but during data transmission, no value was obtained from RFC Request reply to Message mapping, but ABAP debugging could enter the RFC. I don't know what the problem is, please ask for help, thank you very much

entry.title: Re: FM to read the spool list recipient maintianed in SM36
entry.content:
"-----------------------------Distribution list mail id---------------------------------------.
types: begin of ty_job,
        jobname    type btcjob,
        jobcount  type btcjobcnt,
        stepcount  type btcstepcnt,
        progname  type btcprog,
        sdldate   type btcsdldate,
        sdltime   type btcsdltime,
        status    type btcpstatus,
        recobjkey type swo_typeid,
end of ty_job.

DATA:   it_job type table of ty_job with header line,
        wa_job type ty_job.

types: begin of ty_dlist,
        objnam type so_obj_nam,
        dlitp  type so_dli_tp,
        dliyr  type so_own_yr,
        dlino  type so_own_no,
        recobjkey type swo_typeid,
end of ty_dlist.

DATA: it_dlist type table of ty_dlist WITH HEADER LINE,
      wa_dlist type ty_dlist.

DATA: job_key type string,
      receiver like soodd-objnam.

DATA: lv_part1 TYPE string,
      lv_part2 TYPE string.

data: it_tbtco type table of tbtco,
      wa_tbtco type tbtco.
"--------------------------XLSX FILE FORMAT---------------------------------------------------------------------.

DATA: it_member TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF sodm1,
      it_selc   TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF selc,
      it_soopl  TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF soop1.


DATA : gr_table     TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table,
       gr_columns   TYPE REF TO cl_salv_columns_table,
       l_column     TYPE REF TO cl_salv_column,
       lv_xml_type  TYPE salv_bs_constant,
       lt_mailtxt        TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF soli,
       l_mailtxt         TYPE  soli,
       gt_len       TYPE i,
       gt_srctab    TYPE solix_tab,
       lv_subject   TYPE so_obj_des,
       lv_filename  TYPE string,
       lt_att_head  TYPE soli_tab,
       lv_mail_id   TYPE adr6-smtp_addr,
       lv_xml       TYPE xstring.

DATA: lo_send_request TYPE REF TO cl_bcs.
DATA: lo_document TYPE REF TO cl_document_bcs .
DATA: lo_recipient TYPE REF TO if_recipient_bcs.

" select statement for Distribution list mail id.
select  jobname
        jobcount
        stepcount
        progname
        sdldate
        sdltime
        status from tbtcp into table it_job
        where progname = sy-repid and sdldate = sy-datum and status = 'R'.

select objnam
       dlitp
       dliyr
       dlino from soid into table it_dlist.

loop at it_dlist.
  CONCATENATE it_dlist-dlitp it_dlist-dliyr it_dlist-dlino into job_key.
  it_dlist-recobjkey  =  job_key.
  modify it_dlist.
endloop.


sort it_job by sdldate sdltime DESCENDING.

read table it_job into wa_job index 1.
select single recobjkey into wa_job-recobjkey from tbtco where jobcount = wa_job-jobcount and status = 'R'.

split wa_job-recobjkey at space into lv_part1 lv_part2.

select * from tbtco into table it_tbtco where jobcount = wa_job-jobcount and status = 'R'.

if it_tbtco is initial.
  MESSAGE TEXT-101 type 'E'.
endif.


loop at it_tbtco into wa_tbtco.
wa_tbtco-reclogsys = ''.
wa_tbtco-recobjtype = ''.
wa_tbtco-recobjkey = ''.
wa_tbtco-recdescrib = ''.
UPDATE tbtco from wa_tbtco.
endloop.

read table it_dlist into wa_dlist with key recobjkey = lv_part1.
receiver = wa_dlist-objnam.

CALL FUNCTION 'SO_DLI_READ'
 EXPORTING
   DISTRIBUTIONLIST                  = receiver
*   DLI_ID                           = ' '
   OWNER                             = ' '
   SYSTEM_DLI                        = 'X'
* IMPORTING
*   OBJECT_FL_DISPLAY                =
*   OBJECT_HD_DISPLAY                =
*   OBJECT_ID                        =
*   OBJECT_SD_DISPLAY                =
  TABLES
    member                           = it_member
    objpara                          = it_selc
    objparb                          = it_soopl.

IF sy-subrc <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
ENDIF.

sort it_member by address.

if abs_view = 'X'.

TRY.
  CALL METHOD cl_salv_table=>factory(
    IMPORTING
     r_salv_table   = gr_table
    CHANGING
      t_table        = it_final[] ).

ENDTRY.

  gr_columns = gr_table->get_columns( ).

TRY.

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'MATNR'  ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Material number' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'MAT.NO' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Material no' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'MAKTX' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Material Desc' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'MAT.DESC' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Material Desc' ).

*        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'WERKS' ).
*        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Plant' ).
*        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'PLANT' ).
*        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Plant' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'MEINS' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Uom' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'UOM' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Uom' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'EISBE' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Safety stock' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'SAF.STOCK' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Safety stock' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'BSTRF' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Rounding value' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'ROUN.VALUE' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Round.value' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'BSTMI' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Minimum Lot Size' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'MIN.LOT' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Min.Lot.Size' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'BSTMA' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Maximum Lot Size' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'MAX.LOT' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Max.Lot.Size' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'REQ_QTY' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Requirement qty' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'REQ.QTY' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Req.qty' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'STK' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Stock' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'STOCK' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Stock' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'OPEN_PO' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Open PO qty' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'OPEN.PO' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Open.PO.qty' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'MRP_PR' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'MRP PR qty' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'MRP.PR' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'MRP PR qty' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'MAN_PR' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Manual PR qty' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'MAN.PR' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Man.PR.qty' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'STK_1' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Excess Stock' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'EXS.STOCK' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Excess Stock' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'OPEN_PO_1' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Excess Open PO qty' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'EXS.PO' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Exs.Open.PO.qty' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'MRP_PR_1' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Excess MRP PR qty' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'EXS.MRP.PR' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Exs.MRP.PR.qty' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'MAN_PR_1' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Excess Manual PR qty' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'EXS.MAN.PR' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Exs.MAN.PR.qty' ).


CATCH cx_salv_not_found.

ENDTRY.

else.


TRY.
  CALL METHOD cl_salv_table=>factory(
    IMPORTING
     r_salv_table   = gr_table
    CHANGING
      t_table        = IT_DEL_VIEW[] ).

ENDTRY.

  gr_columns = gr_table->get_columns( ).

TRY.

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'MATNR'  ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Material number' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'MAT.NO' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Material no' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'TXZ01' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Material Desc' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'MAT.DESC' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Material Desc' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'WERKS' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Plant' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'PLANT' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Plant' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'SPART' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Division' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'DIV' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Division' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'EKGRP' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Purchase Group' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'PUR.GROUP' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Purchase Group' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'EBELN' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'PO Number' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'PO.NO' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'PO Number' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'EBELP' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'PO line item' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'PO.LINE' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'PO line item' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'EBELP' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'PO line item' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'PO.LINE' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'PO line item' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'AEDAT' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'PO Date' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'PO DATE' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'PO Date' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'EINDT' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Delivery date' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'DEL.DATE' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Delivery date' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'LLIEF' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Vendor No' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'VEN.CODE' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Vendor No' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'LLIEF' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Vendor No' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'VEN.CODE' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Vendor No' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'NAME1' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Vendor Name' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'VEN.NAME' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Vendor Name' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'EXS_OPEN_PO' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Excess Open PO qty' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'EXS.PO' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Exs.Open.PO.qty' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'MENGE_1' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'PO qty' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'PO QTY' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'PO qty' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'NETPR' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Net value' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'NET.VALUE' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Net value' ).

        l_column = gr_columns->get_column( columnname = 'NETWR' ).
        l_column->set_long_text( value = 'Total value' ).
        l_column->set_short_text( value = 'TOT.VALUE' ).
        l_column->set_medium_text( value = 'Total value' ).

ENDTRY.

endif.

    lv_xml_type =  if_salv_bs_xml=>c_type_xlsx.
    lv_xml      = gr_table->to_xml( xml_type = lv_xml_type ).

CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY'
  EXPORTING
    buffer                = lv_xml
*   APPEND_TO_TABLE       = ' '
 IMPORTING
    OUTPUT_LENGTH         = gt_len
  tables
    binary_tab            = gt_srctab.

   lv_subject = 'Excess report against Requirement '.

  DATA(lv_msg) = |Please find the attached file for Requirement against Excess report|.


 l_mailtxt-line = 'Dear Team,'.
      APPEND l_mailtxt TO lt_mailtxt.
      CLEAR l_mailtxt.

      l_mailtxt-line = ' '.
      APPEND l_mailtxt TO lt_mailtxt.
      CLEAR l_mailtxt.

      l_mailtxt-line = lv_msg.
      APPEND l_mailtxt TO lt_mailtxt.
      CLEAR l_mailtxt.

      l_mailtxt-line = ' '.
      APPEND l_mailtxt TO lt_mailtxt.
      CLEAR l_mailtxt.

      l_mailtxt-line = ' '.
      APPEND l_mailtxt TO lt_mailtxt.
      CLEAR l_mailtxt.

      l_mailtxt-line = 'Regards,'.
      APPEND l_mailtxt TO lt_mailtxt.
      CLEAR l_mailtxt.

      l_mailtxt-line = 'ISD-Team.'.
      APPEND l_mailtxt TO lt_mailtxt.
      CLEAR l_mailtxt.

   lo_send_request = cl_bcs=>create_persistent( ).

* * Create the document
    lo_document = cl_document_bcs=>create_document(
      i_type    = 'RAW'
      i_text    = lt_mailtxt "lv_body
      i_subject = lv_subject ).

    lv_filename = 'Excess report.xlsx'.
    DATA(lv_text_line) = |&SO_FILENAME=| & | { lv_filename }|.
    APPEND lv_text_line TO lt_att_head.


*    Add the attachment
    lo_document->add_attachment(
    i_attachment_type    = 'xls'
    i_attachment_subject = 'Excess report'
    i_attachment_size    =  CONV  so_obj_len( gt_len )
    i_att_content_hex    =    gt_srctab
    i_attachment_header  =  lt_att_head ).


*  * PASS THE DOCUMENT TO SEND REQUEST
    lo_send_request->set_document( lo_document ).

    LOOP AT it_member INTO DATA(wa_member).
      lv_mail_id = wa_member-address.
      IF wa_member-sndcp = ''.
        lo_recipient = cl_cam_address_bcs=>create_internet_address( lv_mail_id ).
        TRY.
            lo_send_request->add_recipient(
            EXPORTING
            i_recipient = lo_recipient
            i_express = 'X' ).
        ENDTRY.
      ENDIF.

      IF wa_member-sndcp = 'X'.
        lo_recipient = cl_cam_address_bcs=>create_internet_address( lv_mail_id ). "HERE RECIPIENT IS EMAIL INPUT P_EMAIL
        TRY.
            lo_send_request->add_recipient(
            EXPORTING
            i_recipient = lo_recipient
              i_copy      = 'X'
            i_express = 'X' ).
        ENDTRY.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.

 TRY.
* SEND EMAIL
        lo_send_request->send(
        EXPORTING
        i_with_error_screen = 'X' ).
        IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
          COMMIT WORK.
           lv_msg = 'Mail Sent successfully'.
          WRITE:/ lv_msg.
        ELSE.
          lv_msg = 'NO Record Found'.
          WRITE:/ lv_msg.
        ENDIF.
    ENDTRY.
  ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Same LTMC Staging table throughout the SAP Environments
entry.content:
You need to use synonym tables to handle this.

As these synonym tables can be used as common target in BODS and these will be remaining unchanged. 

Please find detailed explanation in the below link Click here

entry.title: Data Migration Cockpit - Measurement Document - EAM/PM
entry.content:
Hello SAP Guru's,

I am trying to create a Conversion Specification Document to migrate Measurement Documents from ECC to S4HANA.

But the issue here is in the current Data Migration Cockpit Measurement Document upload template doesn't have the fields for "Total counter reading" and "Total counter reading set externally and these fields are necessary for the client.

How can I proceed with this? 

Regards

Deepak Doddagoudar

entry.title: Re: Percent of custom field for budget, budget still show...
entry.content:
Hi @Jen_Cooper ,

Eligibility is assumed already included in the calculation when budget by percent of custom field is used.  You can find the details on this in the admin guide.

Adding Budget Calculations | SAP Help Portal

Hope this helps.

Christian

entry.title: How to disable passcode on branded MDK app ?
entry.content: I have created a branded MDK app, but I’m facing an issue. Whenever I minimize the app or switch to another app (e.g., for adding attachments), the MDK app prompts for a passcode every time I return to it. This is quite irritating. How can I disable the passcode requirement in the MDK app?

entry.title: Re: Users active in BizX but to be made inactive in LMS - SF User Connector Issues & options
entry.content: This is something that can be done if you are using Integration Centre to create your SF User Connector File. By adding a "If/Then/Else" on either the Status column or to "Prepend" text to the users email address so that they do not recieve emails both options are on the table. An even simplier option is to Concatenate the values from both the "Status" and "Learner Access" fields in EC and then build a VlookUp table to give you the desired Learning "Status". Either way it should be an easy fix for either your partner or Integration Centre "Guru". Let us know if this helps or not? Regards Nathan H.

entry.title: Re: How to create Link dimensions in people analytics stories
entry.content: Hi

entry.title: Re: How to create Link dimensions in people analytics stories
entry.content: Hi , Thank you so much for the information . Just wanted to check can we restrict the dimension that shouldn't be applicable on the 2 data sources

entry.title: Re: How to disable passcode on branded MDK app ?
entry.content:
You can completely disable the passcode in Mobile Services > your app > Mobile Settings Exchange and unchecking "Enable Passcode Policy".  This will never prompt for a passcode on the device.

Alternatively you can set the "Lock Timeout" under the same Mobile Settings Exchange > Passcode Policy to a value > 0.  When the value is greater than zero the user can switch to another app and be away from the MDK client for the Lock Timeout number of seconds before being required to enter their passcode again.  This would include attaching files, taking pictures or switching to an unrelated application.

The Lock Timeout defaults to 0 and for Android especially you will want to edit it to something higher since Android needs to use other apps for attachments in particular.

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA - Error in executing the action in Process flow

Any one kindly guide me on this

entry.title: SAP Sovereign Cloud Capabilities and What Sets Us Apart
entry.content:
Author – Subhranshu Sekhar

Introduction

In this post, we will explore SAP's sovereign cloud capabilities, what sets us apart, sovereign cloud solutions portfolio, deployment model and the critical aspects of security in SAP’s sovereign Cloud capabilities, as well as best practices to ensure your data remains protected.

This is a first of a series of blogs about SAP’s sovereign cloud capabilities.

SAP's Definition of Sovereign Cloud

SAP’s sovereign cloud capabilities are specialised cloud services designed to meet the unique security, compliance, and data sovereignty requirements of organisations operating in regulated environments. This includes a cloud computing architecture designed to enforce strict compliance with a country’s laws and regulations regarding data residency and data sovereignty. This cloud service ensures that data resides within specific geopolitical boundaries, providing enhanced control and protection against unauthorized access.

Key Differentiators

  • Cloud services align with government standards or policies to support requirements to certify or authorise the services for use
  • Security-cleared personnel manage cloud computing and operations infrastructure
  • Operations take place in government accredited security facilities. 
  • A local control plane and local automation ensure that organisations can handle data self-sufficiently within their country
  • Subsequent self-sufficiency ensures resilience and maintenance of control and security over cloud workloads, no matter the geopolitical circumstances.

Sovereign Cloud Portfolio

The SAP Intelligent Sustainable Enterprise Suite provides next-generation customer experience by delivering intelligent and innovative solutions for every line of business; these are end-to-end business processes that are modular, integrated, and span across different business solutions by infusing Generative AI use cases . In this blog we will be touching some of the key LoB’s within our current sovereign cloud capabilities

Security

SAP's approach to security in the sovereign cloud is fundamentally based around 3 pillars

  1. Build Securely
  2. Run Securely
  3. Act Securely

Some of the key security features in SAP’s sovereign cloud capabilities are:

  • Data sovereignty and localization, including stricter access controls
  • Regulatory compliance and regular audits built to comply with Australian ISM controls and all solutions in scope are already IRAP assessed and operated  out of a secure Zone 3 and Zone 4 facility
  • Enhanced security controls include encryption, multi-factor authentication, role based access control, advanced threat detection and response

Customer workloads across all LOB's are secured and protected using a shared responsibility model where SAP’s sovereign cloud operations are responsible for implementing preventative controls which range from helpful to restrictive. SAP’s sovereign cloud compliance and security is aligned to the NIST Framework

SAP’s Sovereign Cloud Capabilities in S/4 HANA Private Cloud Edition

 

 

As the cornerstone of RISE with SAP,  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition can safeguard your existing ERP investment while you benefit from the latest innovations and business-wide flexibility. The RISE with SAP offering includes an AI-enabled cloud ERP that's managed and optimized by SAP using a clean core approach. RISE with SAP also offers solutions for optimizing processes, extending and enhancing capabilities, and running sustainably.

SAP’s sovereign cloud capabilities are managed services and deployments of security-hardened SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition solutions designed to adhere to national security and secrecy requirements such as government accreditation, attestation, or certification programs. They are designed for SAP customers who require additional assurances for their cloud workloads and cloud delivery model, including those in the public sector and regulated industries. With sovereign cloud capabilities in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Private Edition, we provide innovative offerings in a more secure sovereign environment, enabling you to comply with the unique regulations specific to your country.

 

BTP

Built upon a Foundation of Trust

SAP’s sovereign cloud capabilities leverage SAP's Business Technology Platform architecture, a proven and secure solution already trusted by organizations worldwide. We take this robust foundation a step further by implementing additional security measures and controls specifically designed to meet the stringent requirements of Australian and New Zealand government departments and critical infrastructure providers

Unparalleled Security and Local Expertise

Your data is our top priority. Our dedicated, Australia-based team provides support for the platform, ensuring your information always remains secure.  Data is stored across geographically redundant data centres, adhering to the highest security standards.

Up to Date and Available

SAP’s sovereign cloud capabilities are built from the ground up for continuous availability. Most updates are deployed in real-time, minimizing disruption to your operations. We leverage industry-leading monitoring and tools to track performance across all cloud components. In the unlikely event of an issue, we are able to leverage our global support team to quickly react and solve the problem, restoring the system’s functionality.

Global Innovation, Locally Delivered

Our global development teams are constantly working to introduce new features and enhancements to the platform. These advancements undergo rigorous security assessments by our dedicated team before being deployed to your environment by local experts. This ensures you benefit from cutting-edge innovation whilst maintaining the highest security posture.

 

 

HCM

 SAP SuccessFactors HCM is a truly global suite of cloud HR solutions that gives you everything you need to fuel employee success and drive organizational agility at scale. Built on SAP’s trusted innovation platform and powered by a single source of people and skills data, it provides the foundation and flexibility required to improve every people experience, decision, and process across your entire business.

Elevate every experience. Increase employee engagement and productivity by delivering individualized experiences designed for how, when, and where people work.

Create a future ready workforce. Boost performance and retention by finding, developing, and mobilizing the skills, attributes, and leaders needed for today and tomorrow.

Enable agile and compliant HR. Improve organizational agility by supporting all people in all locations across all ways of working with the flexibility to quickly expand and adapt.

Increase the strategic value of HR. Achieve more faster with less risk, complexity, and cost by adopting a cloud-first approach backed by technology, partnership, and community.

SAP SuccessFactors offerings within sovereign cloud are designed for SAP customers who require additional assurances for their cloud workloads and cloud delivery model, including those in the public sector and regulated industries. Security-cleared nationals manage cloud computing and operations infrastructure out of certified security facilities.

Our sovereign cloud solutions are designed to meet key audit and regulatory standards.

 

As more offerings and roadmap items are released within SAP sovereign cloud capabilities , future blogs will be covering those updates

This blog is also a contribution from following team members:

Kirsten Tucker – Sovereign cloud ANZ head of Delivery

Hadi Zadeh – Sovereign cloud ANZ ISSO

Warrick Howieson - Sovereign cloud ANZ BTP Core Lead

Bill Xie - Sovereign cloud ANZ BTP Extensions Lead

Abhishek Gudup - Sovereign cloud ANZ HCM Lead

entry.title: Re: Files are not getting picked up in FTP folder in SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI):
entry.content:
Hello Harsha,

Please check connectivity test in the monitoring tab and check whether you can see the folder you are using to pick the files.

Also, please check whether you have updated the known.host file.

Thanks 

Nagendra

entry.title: アウトサイドディスカバリについて
entry.content:
「アウトサイドディスカバリとは何か？」を説明する必要がありますが、ホスト名情報などを含むシステム情報だという認識です。

SLD連携で提供される情報との差異について記載のある文書などはありますか？


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: アウトサイドディスカバリについて
entry.content:
恐れ入りますが、SLDにより転送されるデータをアウトサイドディスカバリにより転送されるデータの差異に関しまして記載されたドキュメントはございません。
下記に簡略的にアウトサイドディスカバリにより収集される情報とSLDにより収集される情報に関しまして記載させていただきます。
　
「アウトサイドディスカバリ」に関しまして簡単に説明しますとアウトサイドディスカバリは、管理対象システムのホストやOS、データベース等に関する情報を自動的に検出、収集してソリューションマネージャへ転送する機能を意味します。
　
ソリューションマネージャを設置した際にデフォルトで利用されるアウトサイドディスカバリの方式は、Diagnostics Agentによる方式となりますが、該当の方法はSAPHostAgentにより収集された情報をDiagnostics Agentへ送信し、Diagnostics AgentによりソリューションマネージャのJavaシステムへ転送して、Javaの方からABAPシステムのLMDBへ同期化させる方式となります。
データの転送に複数の段階が必要となり、お客様による設定も複雑となりますため、それに対して発生する多くのエラーが発生しておりました。そのため、段階を省略して新しくリリースした方式がSAPHostAgentによるアウトサイドディスカバリとなります。
　
SAPHostAgentによるアウトサイドディスカバリは、下記の二つの方法がございます。
1. SAPHostAgentとソリューションマネージャのSLDを連携させる方法
　SAPHostAgentにより収集された情報をソリューションマネージャのSLDへ転送し、SLDからLMDBへ同期化させる方法となり、ノート2556432記載のパラメータを設定して頂く必要がございます。　
2. SAPHostAgentとソリューションマネージャのLMDBを連携させる方法
　直截SAPHostAgentからLMDBへデータを転送する方法となり、KBA 3294487記載ようにパラメータを設定して頂く必要がございます。
　
両方とも、転送する情報の種類は既存のアウトサイドディスカバリと同じく、ホストやOS、データベースの情報等となります。
　
管理対象システムのソフトウェアコンポーネントや製品インスタンスに関する情報は、アウトサイドディスカバリではなく、Data Supplierにより収集される情報となりますので、該当の情報はアウトサイドディスカバリにより収集されません。
Data Supplierにより収集される情報は、SOLMAN_SETUPの「Infrastructure Preparation」のステップ1.1にてご指定なさった方法によりLMDBまで転送される方式が決まります。
SLDをご利用なさっている場合は、SLDより情報が収集され、ソリューションマネージャのLMDBまで転送されます。
SLDをご利用なさらない場合は、マニュアルでData Supplierの設定を行い、LMDBまで転送していただく必要がございます。

entry.title: How to create a test double for method of another class?
entry.content:
I've encountered a problem with a problem about mocking method of another class for developing test class. I use test doubles in order to mock date, but it can mock only the interface, not the class. Is it any possibilities in ABAP to mock the method of another class? 

It will be great if you provide with example)

entry.title: Re: Authenticate via Basic Auth or Client Certificate aga...
entry.content: If you have a custom IAS connected via OpenID Connect to your BTP subaccount you can create a local user with confirmed E-Mail address and changed password there. This user can be used for basic authentication via the approuter when you configure a route with authenticationType basic.

entry.title: Re: How can I use Launchpad Notifications with a RAP App?
Re: post flooding maximum 6 messages per hour?
entry.content: Unfortunately now even the information how many posts can be sent in a specific timeframe was removed. Thanks to Twitter I was able to find this post. Hope that this can be improved..

entry.title: Re: How can I use Launchpad Notifications with a RAP App?

entry.title: Re: Personal setting "company code" in Me21n
entry.content:
Try this:

go to SE51, program SAPLMEPERS, Screen number 1101 > change

then make MEPOHEADER_PROP-BUKRS invisible

entry.title: Re: Raise RAP Events in non-RAP Applications

Regards,
Jens

entry.title: Re: UDF Setup history item list BP ordered
entry.content:
Hi Mark,

yes for sure. The syntax is for using it as FMS. If you want to test a FMS. (Shift+F2 is a FMS)

Save the Query

Open the desirerd Form with data (sales order in that case which has a CardCode)

Then go through the menu to the query. The variable 

 

will be filled with CardCode

regards

entry.title: Re: OVP: Pie Chart Values rounding
entry.content: Solved by adding the DataPoint to the measure section in the annotation file.

entry.title: Re: Enable events from S/4HANA cloud to Event Mesh
entry.content: Detailed and much helpful blog. Thank you

entry.title: Code completion not working in Eclipse for CDS Built-in functions
entry.content: Hi. Good day. When using CDS built-in functions like decimal_shift, unit_conversion etc., code completion is not working in Eclipse. I tried selecting the signature by mouse click and also by Shift + Enter.

entry.title: Re: WWI / chapter 14 / 3E Template
entry.content:
Hello Christoph,

 

I assume you are referring to e.g. this part of the code:

 

<01GESTRAUTHG(M:C14N_SYMBOL_STACK_NEW)>

<11BRG013(M,SAP_EHS_1022_023;*)>

<11BRG014(S:CLASS;*;E:ZISI114C,ADR)>

<11BRG357(G,A:ADR,L:*;*)>

<11BRG015(M,SAP_EHS_1022_024;*)>

<13BNG016(+:01GEHSDGXFLT)>

<13BNG101(+:01G1022024D3(M:C14N_SYM_CHECK_FOR_YES),01GEST0DGTA)>

<13CNG101>

<01GESTRAUTHG(M:C14N_SYMBOL_STACK_PUSH)>

<13ENG101>

Here the authorization group is only used to have something written into the stack, as mark pointed out. Often it doesn't matter what is written onto the stack since we only need a distiction whether the stack is empty or filled. 

 

Best,


Ralph

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA 2022 Application and HANA DB supported o...
